title: Ultrahigh pressure fast size exclusion chromatography for top-down proteomics.
author: Chen X Ge Y
content: S-EPMC3839113 PMC3839113 Ultrahigh pressure fast size exclusion chromatography for top-down proteomics. Top-down MS-based proteomics has gained a solid growth over the past few years but still faces significant challenges in the LC separation of intact proteins. In top-down proteomics
